extraction.one_line_summary: ACKERMANN Pascal won the neutralized sprint finish after GC times were taken at first finish line passage due to dangerous wet conditions
tactical_patterns: Race officials neutralized final lap for GC but allowed sprint competition, revealing willingness to split safety protocols mid-stage.
ACKERMANN braked and restarted sprint in final 250m using GAVIRIA as inadvertent leadout, showing adaptability in chaotic conditions.
No sprint trains survived final technical circuit in wet conditions, forcing individual sprinter positioning over organized leadouts.

rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: abandoned after 1km despite no broken bones from previous day crash, suggesting non-mechanical withdrawal decision
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: positive: won technical wet sprint despite brake-restart move at 250m, demonstrated superior bike handling over pure power sprinters
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: neutral: survived neutralized stage to retain pink jersey with no tactical requirement to defend
